title: Rat Totems
description:
Changes totems into rats so instead of carrying a boring totem around everywhere, you can carry a cute rat. 


Currently there are 16 rats to pick from
body:
Changes totems into rats so instead of carrying a boring totem around everywhere, you can carry a cute rat

Difference in version numbers is to indicate when they were added to the Planet Minecraft download. It should also work in earlier versions than 1.20-21 (probably until 1.14) but they haven't been tested. 

If you want a specific rat you can ask me on the [Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/rat-totems-for-java/), on my [Tumblr (Leaf4e)](https://www.tumblr.com/leaf4e), or on discord (also leaf4e)

Current types:
-     Albino
-     Black
-     Agouti/Brown
-     Agouti Bareback (white with brown head)
-     Black Hooded (white with a black head and stripe down back)
-     Cinnamon (reddish brown)
-     Champagne/Blonde
-     White
-     Himalayan
-     Grey
-     Light Grey
-     Silver
-     Powder Blue (light blueish silver)
-     Russian Blue (blue grey/darker version of powder blue)
-     Naked (no fur)
-     Pink (fantasy morph)
